settings.heading: Rest starts with your breath.
settings.subheading: Aira's magnetic nasal strip gently opens your airway for deeper, quieter sleep, no discomfort.

settings.heading: Breathe the way you were meant to.
settings.subheading: Drag to compare your airways — without and with the Aira nasal strip.

settings.heading: Simple. Effective. Aira.
settings.subheading: Two products. Everything you need to breathe freely and sleep better.

settings.title: High blood pressure
settings.description: Mouth breathing activates the body's stress response, raising cortisol and constricting blood vessels. Over time this can contribute to chronically elevated blood pressure — a major risk factor for heart disease.

settings.title: Snoring
settings.description: When the nose is bypassed, the soft tissue at the back of the throat is more likely to vibrate during sleep — producing the sound of snoring. Nasal breathing stabilises this tissue and reduces vibration significantly.

settings.title: Dry mouth
settings.description: Breathing through the mouth dries out saliva, which is your body's first line of defence against bacteria. Chronic dry mouth leads to bad breath, tooth decay, and gum disease.

settings.title: Poor sleep quality
settings.description: Mouth breathing reduces oxygen uptake and disrupts sleep architecture — resulting in more time in lighter sleep stages. Switching to nasal breathing has been shown to improve deep sleep and morning energy levels.

settings.title: Facial development
settings.description: In children, long-term mouth breathing can alter the development of facial bones — leading to a narrower palate, elongated face, and crowded teeth. Early nasal breathing habits help guide healthy craniofacial growth.

settings.heading: Health effects of poor airflow
settings.subheading: Mouth breathing and restricted nasal airflow have been linked to a surprising range of health issues — many of which are reversible.

settings.heading: Trusted by Millions. Backed by Research.
settings.tagline: Trusted by Millions. Backed By Research.
settings.body: SleepScore Labs confirms what our users experience every day — better breathing and better sleep.

settings.heading: Instantly Expands
settings.description: Intake instantly expands your nasal passages, helping you breathe freely with less struggle.

settings.heading: Sweat Resistant. Stays On.
settings.description: Aira was originally designed for athletes, so the Tabs are made to withstand even your sweatiest workouts.

settings.heading: Won't Collapse
settings.description: Engineered with rigid support that doesn't give in, ensuring your nose stays open all night.

settings.heading: Skin Safe. Medical Grade.
settings.description: Hypoallergenic, medical-grade materials. FDA registered and made in the USA.

settings.heading: Reusable Band
settings.description: Aira bands are built to last — you only replace the adhesive tabs, not the band itself.

settings.heading: Built for better breathing.
settings.subheading: Every feature of the Aira strip was designed with one goal — to keep your airway open, all night long.
